title: ClickEvent
description: Canonical click event placed on Kinesis by the click processor and archived to S3 (Parquet) by Firehose. The raw unit of truth for reconciliation.

impression_id.description: Dedup key. Reconciliation de-duplicates raw records on this field.

campaign_id.description: Denormalized at capture so Flink/Spark aggregate without a join.

click_ts.description: Event time (ISO8601 UTC). Basis for minute_bucket and watermarking.

user_agent.description: Optional; reserved for future fraud analysis, not used in counts.

ingest_ts.description: Time the processor accepted the click (ISO8601 UTC).
